name: CANopenUploadGetSigned
title: CANopenUploadGetSigned
description: Returns the data of a CANopen upload in a callback function as a signed value.

parameters.name: errCode
parameters.description: Error code buffer (is entered in index 0 of the field) 0: Value was retrieved 1: Value not available

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
